revision_summary: Four targeted fixes required: (1) cherry_pick_moments[5] timestamp must be corrected from 02:21 to 22:41 (or 25:28) to accurately index the positive adult_child_decision_maker handling; the current indexing places a positive cherry pick at the empathy miss timestamp. (2) The funeral disclosure at 23:39 must be reframed as a scheduling-constraint objection rather than an emotional vulnerability disclosure equivalent to 02:10 — the two are not equivalent trust gifts and conflating them distorts the coaching hierarchy; 02:10 is the primary empathy gap, 23:39 is secondary and lighter. (3) handoff_brief.unresolved_concerns[1] must be corrected to acknowledge that the 12-month kWh readback succeeded and provides the closer with annual usage data — characterizing the bill information as consisting only of 'a single high-month data point' ignores the kWh collection session. (4) Add a missed cherry pick for the 'interest_in_solar' verify skip — Holland never asked why James was interested in solar (the codex's required emotional anchor item), and the analysis does not surface this gap anywhere. The coaching_implication invented phrases ('I'm sorry to hear that — no rush at all' and the ComEd payment-stability rephrase) should be defanged to intent-and-direction language per the codex's numeric_discipline and fabricated-alternative prohibition. Button_up application to in-person vs phone appointment should include a caveat about schema ambiguity.
